meta.title: Services | Eagle Logistics
meta.description: Domestic express, international courier, air cargo, surface cargo, student document delivery, and logistics solutions from Eagle Logistics.

hero.headline: Services
hero.subheadline: Affordable international and domestic courier with professional customer care and continuous Track & Trace.

content.intro: Eagle Logistics & Express Services is dedicated to reach every Documents, Non-Documents - Sample Shipments, Commercial Shipments, Import & Export Goods - to every possible place in the world as per customer requirements. We are committed to provide affordable international courier service adhering to stringent time schedules and quality standards. We provide international express service with operational versatility and professional Customer Care, with shipment status monitored on a continuous basis through our web-based Track & Trace system. Our associates in New York/USA, Singapore and Dubai/UAE function as world hubs for international connectivity through a network of strategic business partners.

services.title: Express Service
services.description: Your time-sensitive Documents / Non-documents are delivered next day in all Metros, Major Cities & Towns on a priority basis.

services.title: Surface Cargo
services.description: All your bulk consignments are transported through our own fleet of vehicles, leased railway wagons, and other modes to stations all over India - supported by container LCVs. We ensure added safety and timely delivery of surface shipments.

services.title: Global Service
services.description: All documents / Non-documents are delivered worldwide at most economical rates. Chosen modes of operational connectivity give us a cutting edge for faster services as per customer requirements.

services.title: Air Cargo
services.description: Bulk consignments sent as cargo on flights to destinations of your choice. Specialized handling and door-to-door delivery for critical priority shipments such as medicines (vaccines), perishable commodities (fruits and vegetables), and other time-sensitive cargo. Delivered to the specific destination in 24-48 hrs based on requirements.

services.title: Universal Express
services.description: Special messenger services for exclusive delivery of university applications. Special discounts for students sending applications from India to UK, USA, Australia, New Zealand and other major destinations - reliable, fast and secure.

services.title: Healthcare & Pharma
services.description: Specialized handling for medicines including cold-chain logistics for vaccines and other critical healthcare shipments.

services.title: Food & Homemade
services.description: Gentle packing for pickles, sweets, spices, and homemade snacks with careful handling to protect fragile contents.

services.title: Warehousing & Dispatches
services.description: We provide godown facilities and function as a logistics service provider for procurement, storage, processing, packaging and dispatch of goods as per customer needs - a one-stop shop for all logistic solutions.

services.title: Bulk Cargo
services.description: Cost-effective solutions for larger consignments to major hubs worldwide through our partner network.

items.title: End-to-end tracking
items.description: Track your parcel from collection to delivery.

items.title: Quick quotes
items.description: Get quotes in seconds for international shipping.

items.title: Parcel protection
items.description: Add protection cover to the parcel if required.

items.title: Customs support
items.description: Easy to fill out customs documents, built into the booking process.

items.title: Flexible pickup
items.description: Choice of having the parcel collected from home / work, or drop it off locally.

cta.title: Ready to Ship?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you're sending - we'll find the best partner and rate.
